name: create_folder
description: Create a new folder at the specified path in the user's Dropbox. The parent folders must already exist. Returns the metadata of the newly created folder.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: The path where the new folder should be created (e.g., '/Documents/NewFolder').

parameters.name: autorename
parameters.description: If true, Dropbox will rename the folder if a folder with the same name already exists.
